content.en:
This time, Ye Tian exchanged 10 million Galanbao coins in one go.

I have to say that this exchange really shocked the person in charge of the Garanbao ship.

They also didn't expect that there was a peak realm god who was so rich that he would be able to take out 10 million Galanbao coins at one time.

Of course, even if it is 10 million Garanbao Coins, it is not worth mentioning in the eyes of the Garanbao ship.

So, they were just slightly surprised and didn't do anything.

......

"Did you help deduce a kind of Extradimensional Secret Treasure on your Gallanbol Ship?"

After Ye Tian walked around, he asked an employee of the Jialanbao ship.

This employee is also a peak realm god, and his aura is not strong, and it is estimated that it is similar to the fallen six-hole realm god.

He said slightly: "This guest, the super dimensional secret treasure suitable for deduction is too rare, we don't have it on this galanbao ship, and even if there is, its value is unimaginable, and it will hardly be taken out for sale, it is estimated that only the deduction super dimensional secret treasure with great side effects can be taken out." "

Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, the employee said again: "We don't have a super-dimensional secret treasure like deduction, but the Jialanbao ship has a super-dimensional thing that can be deduced, and once that extra-dimensional thing is fused, it can be deduced." However, once the deduction is made, the side effects are very large. "

"The side effects are huge, how big are they?"

Ye Tian asked.

The employee said, "That extra-dimensional thing is a medium-level extra-dimensional thing, and it is very difficult for the peak realm god to fuse a medium-dimensional thing. Only a half-step extra-dimensional realm can easily fuse a medium-level extra-dimensional thing, and even a half-step extra-dimensional realm does not dare to use that medium-extra-dimensional thing to deduce. Because once it is deduced, that extra-dimensional thing will even consume the potential of the extra-dimensional Dao species, affecting the breakthrough and impacting the extra-dimensional realm. And once the peak realm god uses this extradimensional thing, it will not only speed up the assimilation speed of the body superdimensional by many times, but also affect the eternal Dao species, and if it can't be deduced many times, it will have to be killed. "

"What is that extradimensional thing called, and how much is it worth?"

Ye Tian continued to ask.

The employee stared at Ye Tian with some surprise, he said it so clearly, but Ye Tian was still interested?

Maybe just ask.

So, he spoke: "That extradimensional object is called the Garanbo Plate, which was accidentally discovered by our Garanbo ship, and its value was discovered, but unfortunately after a circle, it finally returned to our Garanbol ship, and it was not sold after that. "

Why is it not sold, everyone knows that such a chicken and deceitful extradimensional thing, who dares to integrate and use it?

Once fused, there is no way to break away, unless you destroy the eternal Dao species or the extradimensional Dao species, but the body is still affected by the extradimensional thing, and the price paid is too great to completely get rid of the influence of extradimensional assimilation.

Of course, it can also be fused all the time without use, but that will undoubtedly occupy a place for extradimensional things.

The limit of the extra-dimensional things that the peak realm god can fuse is two, and wasting one place will undoubtedly reduce his combat power a lot.

Therefore, for many peak realm gods, the Jialan Stone Disk is not as good as the most garbage extradimensional thing.

The point is that the Garan Stone Disc can be used for deduction, and it is extremely rare, and it is impossible to sell the Garan Treasure Ship at a low price, and even if it can't be sold, it will be kept.

"This guest, if you want the Garan Stone Plate, our Garan Treasure Ship is willing to sell it to you for one million Garan Treasure Coins!"

Said the employee of the Galanbao ship.

1,000,000 Galanbao Coins!!

This price is undoubtedly very terrifying, it is even more expensive than the top-level extra-dimensional Dao inheritance, and the normal price of a complete medium-dimensional extra-dimensional thing is only a hundred thousand Gala Blue Treasure Coins.

And even if the Jialan Stone Disk is rare, this price is undoubtedly too high, and it is almost comparable to the price of some high-level extradimensional things.

Who would buy such a terrible price?

Ye Tian pondered for a while and said, "Okay, then make a deal at the price of one million Jialanbao coins." "

Hearing Ye Tian's words, the employee was taken aback.

There are really peak realm gods to buy!

He couldn't afford it, and Ye Tian could just take out so many Garanbao coins?

This is still the pinnacle realm god of the weak territory, and those who don't know it think it's the pinnacle realm god from a powerful territory superdimensional force!

However, since Ye Tian bought it, there was naturally no reason not to sell the Jialanbao ship.

Subsequently.

This employee called his leader, a more powerful pinnacle realm god, and brought the Jialan stone plate and made a deal with Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained the Jialan Stone Plate.

Some of the treasures deduced in the past are no longer of much use, and if he wants to deduce the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Inheritance in the future, then he must use the Jialan Stone Plate, otherwise he will not be able to deduce and perfect the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Inheritance.

Moreover, with this Garan Stone Plate, it will be easier for him to create extradimensional techniques in the future.

"'Keep looking, maybe there's something good!'"

Ye Tian muttered.

As a result, it wasn't long before I found something good. []

【Extra-Dimensional Epiphany】

This extra-dimensional epiphany was born in a special territory, and when the flower blooms, it will produce real extra-dimensional power, but the duration is too short, and it is undoubtedly impossible to comprehend the real extra-dimensional power with the help of extradimensional epiphany.

But if there are enough extra-dimensional epiphany, then there is still a little hope to comprehend the real extradimensional epiphany.

Unfortunately, the extradimensional epiphany is extremely beautiful when it is in full bloom, and it is especially suitable for half-step extradimensional realms or extradimensional realms for gifts, which makes it very expensive.

It is undoubtedly not cost-effective for the peak realm god to buy it to comprehend the power of the transcendent dimension.

But Ye Tian has never touched a treasure containing the true power of the extra-dimensional, and the extra-dimensional elves can't be found at the moment, maybe he can buy a few extra-dimensional epiphanys to experience it. (De Zhao Hao)

"The 500,000 Galanbol coins of a super-dimensional epiphany is too expensive, but no matter how expensive it is, you have to buy it!"

Ye Tian bought six extra-dimensional epiphany in one go, it was not that he didn't want to buy more, it was that there were only six extradimensional epiphany left on this Galanbo ship, and he wanted to buy more extra-dimensional epiphany, unless he left the territory of 7,362.

After that, Ye Tian purchased a pair of information about the superdimensional elves.

He had learned a little bit about the extradimensional elves before, but after all, there wasn't much, so this time he wanted to thoroughly understand the information of the extradimensional elves.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also purchased some extra-dimensional resources that were particularly suitable for him, different cultivation races, different cultivation paths, and different extra-dimensional resources that were suitable for him.

He also encountered an Eternal Dao Seed on the Galanbo ship, which was very suitable for refining himself, so he bought a lot.

In this way, he will condense the twelfth Eternal Realm Spirit in the future, and it will be faster.
